words.name: Hello
words.description: A common greeting used to initiate conversation or acknowledge someone's presence.

words.name: Hi
words.description: An informal greeting, often used among friends or in casual situations.

words.name: Good Morning
words.description: A greeting used in the morning hours, typically from dawn until noon.

words.name: Good Afternoon
words.description: A greeting used in the afternoon hours, typically from noon until evening.

words.name: Good Evening
words.description: A greeting used in the evening hours, typically after sunset.

words.name: Good Night
words.description: A farewell greeting used when parting at night or before going to bed.

words.name: Good Noon
words.description: A greeting specifically used during the noon hour.

words.name: How Are You
words.description: A friendly greeting used to inquire about someone's well-being.

words.name: Not Much, You
words.description: A casual response to 'How are you?' indicating that things are fine or nothing special is happening.
